examples: She enjoyed the relative informality of island life.
In many other homes, this china and silver elegance has given way to a stoneware and stainless informality, with dresses assuming an equally casual Friday look.
But she liked his natural manner and informality.
Nevertheless, coping with informality comes at a high cost to Maria and millions others.
The country's easy informality and open-access attitudes can surprise foreigners used to more strictly controlled environments.
